name: JPGLabs [GitOps] - GitLab CI Pipeline Monitor
description: Receives GitLab pipeline webhook events. On success: notifies Slack. On success+main: auto-tags CalVer, syncs tag to GitHub. On failure in main/staging: notifies with rollback info and auto-reverts merge commit. On failure in develop: warning only.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ text: '[GitOps] Pipeline SUCCESS + Tagged
Project: ' + $('Calculate Version').first().json.project_name + ' | Branch: main
Tag: ' + $('Calculate Version').first().json.new_tag + '
Commit: ' + $('Calculate Version').first().json.commit_short + ' - ' + $('Calculate Version').first().json.commit_message + '
Duration: ' + $('Calculate Version').first().json.duration + ' | Author: ' + $('Calculate Version').first().json.author + '
Pipeline: ' + $('Calculate Version').first().json.pipeline_url }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ text: '[GitOps] Pipeline SUCCESS
Project: ' + $json.project_name + ' | Branch: ' + $json.branch + '
Commit: ' + $json.commit_short + ' - ' + $json.commit_message + '
Duration: ' + $json.duration + ' | Author: ' + $json.author + '
Pipeline: ' + $json.pipeline_url }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ text: '[GitOps] PIPELINE FAILED (CRITICAL)
Project: ' + $json.project_name + ' | Branch: ' + $json.branch + '
Commit: ' + $json.commit_short + ' - ' + $json.commit_message + '
Failed: ' + $json.failure_details + '
Duration: ' + $json.duration + ' | Author: ' + $json.author + '
Pipeline: ' + $json.pipeline_url + '

Rollback command:
```' + $json.rollback_command + '```' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ text: $json.auto_revert.success ? '[GitOps] Auto-revert completed: ' + $json.auto_revert.message : '[GitOps] AUTO-REVERT FAILED: ' + $json.auto_revert.message }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ text: '[GitOps] Pipeline FAILED (develop)
Project: ' + $json.project_name + ' | Branch: ' + $json.branch + '
Commit: ' + $json.commit_short + ' - ' + $json.commit_message + '
Failed: ' + $json.failure_details + '
Duration: ' + $json.duration + ' | Author: ' + $json.author + '
Pipeline: ' + $json.pipeline_url }) }}
